name: agent-workflow-kit
description: A decision-complete Design, adaptive Act, and independent Review workflow for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Design, implement, and independently review changes
interface.longDescription: A repository-grounded workflow that records decisions, requires explicit execution authorization, stops on unresolved implementation doubt, and independently verifies real production paths.
defaultPrompt: Design a repository-grounded change with me
Review this implementation against its Design
